summary: Full regression + new features test for MyGenie POS. All 14 feature checks passed. Backend 8/8, Frontend 100%.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 359: hmac.new() should be hmac.new() -> this is actually hmac.new which is correct in Python 3 (hmac.new is valid). No issue.
DemoLanding.jsx imports Reveal but the form card is NOT wrapped in Reveal (good - form visible above fold immediately). Micro-proof cards are wrapped in Reveal which is acceptable.
test_credentials: admin@mygenie.online / admin123 — CMS login verified working
seed_data_creation: Created 4 TEST_ demo requests via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CR-21 changes verified: phone 9104743156 correct, WhatsApp FAB mobile-only (lg:hidden, 390px visible, 1280px hidden), /demo page loads with logo-only navbar + form card immediately visible (no Reveal wrapper on form), years_in_business dropdown present on all DemoForm instances (homepage, /demo, /petpooja-alternative), /petpooja-alternative has correct headline and landing-navbar. CMS login working. Pricing shows Starter/Growth/Pro plans. Sticky mobile CTA visible after scroll. OTP graceful degradation confirmed. MOCKED: Freshsales CRM, OTP SMS, Razorpay, S3.
mocked_apis: Freshsales CRM sync (no API key in preview)
